title: Creative entrepreneur & project director
content: A current founder of a non-government organisation Stellar Sound Foundation. At the helm of every music video that I have recorded. Event and production coordinator with over 200 participants on stage.

title: Music producer and composer
content: Rich and complex composing style with orchestral arranging approach in modern setup. Recently started producing my own music and exploring mixing and mastering.

title: Music teacher
content: As a Music Pedagogist with a bachelor degree in her hands, gained a rich, international history in various teaching positions. Held one-on-one lessons like piano, singing, theory and group lessons in elementary, mid and high school music teacher. Worked with the British, American, ABRSM and custom-tailored cirriculums.

title: Pianist / Keyboardist
content: Trained as a classical pianist throughout highschool and university. Has performed as a solo full-time pianist in restaurants, private events like birthdays and weddings, brand events and luxorious hotels with a highlight performing in Waldorf Astoria. Experience playing keyboard in rock bands.

title: Web developer
content: Currently working part-time as front-end developer. Experience working in React with sensible UX and pixel-perfect touch. Extensive portfolio of websites including this one.

title: Creative branding and promotion
content: A recent interest towards creating independant music brought new learnings and knowledge in brand and campaign creation and execution. This trending topic is a unique puzzle that can be learned only by trial and error.
